nonGoals: Do NOT add new test cases
Do NOT change any other function
Do NOT touch any other file
objective: Make getTagDef() case-insensitive by lowercasing both sides of the tag comparison
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, change the getTagDef comparison from strict equality `t.tag === tagName` to case-insensitive `t.tag.toLowerCase() === tagName.toLowerCase()`. This single-line change makes all SSML tag lookups case-insensitive. isTagSupportedByProvider() benefits automatically since it delegates to getTagDef(). No other logic changes.

nonGoals: Do NOT add tests for provider-specific behavior beyond the casing parity check
Do NOT change existing test assertions
objective: Add test cases for uppercase, mixed-case, and lowercase tag lookups plus a nonexistent guard
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add test cases that validate case-insensitive lookup: getTagDef('PROSODY') returns the prosody definition, getTagDef('Break') returns the break definition, getTagDef('emphasis') returns the emphasis definition (already-lowercase remains working), getTagDef('nonexistent') returns undefined, and isTagSupportedByProvider('PROSODY', provider) matches isTagSupportedByProvider('prosody', provider) for a known provider.
